variants.name: Tails
variants.subtitle: Original Sonic Series
variants.bio: Miles Prower, better known as Tails, is Sonic's best friend and closest ally. Originally a young fox bullied for his twin tails, he discovered he could use them as a helicopter to fly. Tails is a brilliant inventor and engineer who loyally follows Sonic on adventures to save the world.
variants.appearance: Bright yellow fox with two large, fluffy white-tipped tails. Blue shoes with rocket jets. Classic friendly expression.

variants.name: Tails
variants.subtitle: Sonic X Anime
variants.bio: In the Sonic X anime, Tails arrives on Earth alongside Sonic and becomes more tech-savvy than ever. He remains Sonic's closest friend but gains more depth, dealing with typical teenage issues while helping save both worlds. His friendship with Sonic is the emotional core of the series.
variants.appearance: Similar to classic Tails but slightly more anime-styled. Yellow with two tails, expressive eyes, modern clothing updates.

variants.name: Tails
variants.subtitle: IDW Comics
variants.bio: IDW's Tails is a multifaceted hero who often leads missions independently. He grapples with self-doubt and perfectionism while proving himself as a capable leader and tactician. His relationship with Sonic evolves to show mutual respect and partnership, not just sidekick dynamics.
variants.appearance: Classic Tails design with comic book style. Yellow fox with twin tails, expressive features, heroic proportions.

variants.name: Tails
variants.subtitle: Sonic Movie Trilogy
variants.bio: In the live-action Sonic movies, Tails is portrayed as a brave adventurer from another dimension. He becomes Sonic's trusted ally and proves himself despite being underestimated. His journey from uncertain newcomer to confident hero mirrors his comic counterparts.
variants.appearance: CGI-rendered realistic fox with two tails. Orange/yellow fur, expressive eyes, movie-accurate proportions with tech gear.

variants.name: Nine
variants.subtitle: Sonic Prime (The Chaos Council)
variants.bio: Nine is Tails from a cybernetic post-apocalyptic dimension, having been experimented on and enhanced with technology. Bitter from betrayal and isolation, Nine becomes a tech-enhanced villain who mirrors what Tails could become without friendship. His arc explores themes of isolation versus connection.
variants.appearance: Tails with heavy cybernetic modifications and a blue color scheme. Metallic enhancements, futuristic tech aesthetic, serious expression contrasting with typical Tails.

variants.name: Tails
variants.subtitle: Sonic Boom (TV Series)
variants.bio: Sonic Boom's Tails is a comedic, often anxious inventor who frequently creates gadgets that backfire. He provides comic relief while remaining deeply loyal to Sonic. Despite his mishaps, he's a capable fighter and good friend who cares deeply about his team.
variants.appearance: Simplified cartoon style with exaggerated features. Yellow fox with two tails, big expressive eyes, friendly demeanor.
